questions.question: Where should chain IDs, explorer URLs, deployment namespaces, token labels, thresholds, and shared ABIs be changed, and which checks are required when an exported shape changes?
You are adding a new indexed contract and event. Which current package documentation defines the config, ABI, handler-entry-point, codegen, and hosted-build mirror procedure?
How must a dashboard UI change be verified in the browser, including logged-in and logged-out behavior and the data source used by local verification?
What is the current sequence for deploying a new Envio indexer version, monitoring its sync, and promoting it without allowing an agent to auto-promote?
Which source maps Terraform stack ownership, and when may a stack be applied locally versus through the production-infra environment on main?
For a Terraform-managed Cloud Run service change, which checklist governs plan safety, rollout health, rollback readiness, and post-deploy verification?
Why are GitHub Issues the canonical active-work queue instead of BACKLOG.md, and what consequence does that have for migrated tasks?
Why are stETH actuals sampled sub-daily and rolled into daily rows rather than remaining event-only or using a single midnight read?
Why does recurring documentation gardening create one bounded issue instead of letting a scheduled model edit or merge documentation directly?
An indexer field is being added and rendered in the dashboard. Which checklist defines writer/reader/schema alignment, degraded behavior, interaction coverage, and rollout sequencing?
When changing a GitHub Actions workflow or required check, which checklist protects the required CI sentinel, path routing, action pinning, permissions, and notifier coverage?
Why does the agent quality gate refuse to run after package scripts or lockfiles change, and what explicit flag is required after reviewing that lifecycle surface?
Which commands regenerate and verify the documentation catalog, preview a bounded audit packet, and preview the weekly garden issue decision without mutation?
Which commands claim an agent-ready issue, move it to review with a PR, and release it back to ready or needs-grooming when work cannot continue?
What exact shared probe must run before declaring a PR all clear, and which current-head Codex approval or break-glass signal is required?
Which alert stack owns QuickNode webhook delivery, Sentry-to-Slack, and on-call announcements, and what safety checks apply before changing it?
What is the supported setup path for a fresh worktree or clone, and how does the hosted Claude Code bootstrap differ from a local setup?
How does the recurring documentation garden select a packet, handle an already claimed or blocked issue, and require evidence before changing or deleting a document?
